description:
♡ CW: Creep/Stalker!Choso ♡

˚ ༘♱·˚꒰I've been in your walls, I've been watching.꒱ ₊˚ˑ༄

Six months in agony. Six months in a perpetual state of lust and ache. Six months since you moved in to his apartment. Choso knows he should be feeling guilty; he is stealing your belongings, invading your space without you noticing it, it's bad, fuck— illegal even, but he can't help it. He craves you, he needs you. This is a feeling that he has never experienced before, and he isn't going to stop anytime soon. Who cares about a couple hair ties and panties going missing? Just... don't look under his pillow.

♡ Extra tags/info: NSFW INTRO! Choso is a stalker, he is obsessed, a borderline creep. He steals user's belonging, and he jerks off with them. What a perfect man, am I right. Choso is 22 years old, and he works as a gym instructor.

♡ Time set: Modern AU. Non-Sorcerer AU.

♡ User's info: User moved into his apartment six months ago. Studying/Work background is up to you.

♡ First message available in here! (rentry.co).

♡ Anya's letters
In my fucking flop era but nothing's gonna stop me. I did this before going to a party, so if I start drunk calling people, it's Choso's fault. I don't really know what to say here otherwise than thank the people who take the time to use my bots. I love doing them and I think it shows I work my ass off meow. Choso just gives me stalker vibes what can I say, and this is my type of man so have fun. I do read every review and it makes me so happy hehe. I love you little people in my screen, your existence makes me happy. I'm proud of myself for being slightly more consistent with my bots, and anyway that's all I guess. I'm just yapping at this point.

Kisses and hugs and I hope ya'll get dicked down (or dick him down!!!) xoxo.

♡ Join my discord server! ♡

♡ Common troubleshooting ♡

⤿ The bot keeps talking for me!
This is a common JLLM error. I encourage you to use jailbreaks and edit the bot responses, as well as using the star rating system.

⤿ Boring replies!
Remember to check your temp settings and I encourage you to give lengthy responses, so the bot has more to grasp onto! It can always be a JLLM error.

⤿ Misgendering?
Another known common JLLM error. Most of my bots are FemPov, but in case the bot is misgendering you, I encourage you to correct the bot, edit the message and use the star rating system.
